description: Git branch prefix allowlist SSOT (rules/85-git-policy.md). Referenced by git-policy-guard.py.

comments.matching: A branch name is split on the first '/'; the prefix must appear in source/sink/trunk/special, otherwise (or on a forbidden_patterns match) it is a violation. main is the sole trunk (no slash).
comments.source_semantics: Can be a merge source and can flow toward main.
comments.sink_semantics: Merge target only. Using a sink branch as a source is a violation. (Empty by default for solo projects — add e.g. 'qa' if you introduce a one-way integration branch.)
comments.trunk_semantics: Merge target (via PR) plus a sync source that can flow to feature branches.
comments.special_semantics: Validation skipped — backup/rollback, renovate bot, archive are out-of-policy special purposes.
comments.extension_policy: Adding a new category changes hook behavior = equivalent in weight to a rules/85 change. Review per PR.
